title: Atlanta Jazz Festival 2026
description: 49th annual Memorial Day weekend jazz festival featuring Grammy-level artists. Perfect outdoor date with live music, food trucks, and skyline views. Artists include Kamasi Washington, Christian McBride & Ursa Major, Nate Smith, and more.

title: Sting 3.0 Tour
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Legendary Sting performs his greatest hits in an intimate amphitheater setting. Great excuse to get dressed up and enjoy world-class music under the stars.

title: Big Dog Improv Fest: Saturday Show
description: Two-night improv festival with hilarious performances. Interactive comedy is a great shared experience for couples — you'll laugh together and maybe get pulled on stage.

title: Dad's Garage: Improvised Action Movie
description: Improvisers create a brand-new action movie on the spot. Fresh, funny, and completely unpredictable — a unique date night experience you won't find anywhere else.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend: Reggae Afrobeat Soca
description: 100% Reggae, Afrobeat, and SOCA vibes for Memorial Day weekend. Dance close or dance wild — this is the perfect setting for a lively date.

title: Latin Fridays (Viernes Tropicales)
description: Weekly salsa lesson followed by a full Latin social dance party. No partner needed — show up solo and leave with new moves and a great night out. Includes bachata, merengue, and more.

title: Don Toliver: Octane Tour
description: Hyped rapper Don Toliver brings his Octane Tour to State Farm Arena. High energy, great vibes, and an unforgettable arena atmosphere.

title: Cold + Idle Heirs at The Masquerade
description: British alternative rock band Cold performs live at The Masquerade. Intimate venue, great sound, and a more underground concert experience perfect for couples who love live music.

title: Peachtree Road Farmers Market
description: Atlanta's premier farmers market with 70+ local vendors, artisanal foods, live music, and a weekly chef pop-up. Perfect for a relaxed morning date — grab coffee, stroll, and discover local flavors together.

title: Afro Beat & Caribbean Vibes Night
description: Tropical Vibes Night bringing the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music. Great energy, dancing, and a vibrant crowd — an exotic date night without leaving Atlanta.

title: ECHOES Exhibition at Kai Lin Art
description: 'Echoes' exhibition exploring themes of return and interruption through contemporary art. Free admission, intimate gallery setting — perfect for an art-loving couple looking for meaningful conversation starters.

title: Salsa Bachata Havana Nights @ La Industria
description: Saturday afternoon/evening salsa and bachata social with class and dancing. Great for beginners and experienced dancers alike. Food, drinks, and dancefloor vibes all in one.

title: 9 Mile Station Rooftop Dinner
description: Atlanta's best rooftop views paired with seasonal plates and craft cocktails. Perched above Ponce City Market — perfect for a romantic dinner date with panoramic city skyline views.

title: Improv Annihilation - Season 2
description: Fast-paced improv comedy at a stylish venue. Interactive, energetic, and always surprising — a fun mid-week date night that keeps the conversation going.

title: Dad's Garage: Family Vacation Improv
description: Fan-favorite improv format returning for a limited time. Improvisers dig into archives for a unique comedy experience — quirky, surprising, and perfect for couples with a sense of humor.
